text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The older racers running in the Sprinters Stakes
are so strong and reliable...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if I can even hold a candle to them,
but Trainer reassures me with some encouraging
words!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O and Yamanin Zephyr are both
extremely motivated and will be tough opponents
to beat, but that's okay!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
After all, I have my trainer with me. I'm going to
stand proudly on this new stage and become the
best sprinter there is!
